hotels.name: Meridian Grand New York
hotels.description: A flagship five-star property in the heart of Midtown Manhattan, offering sweeping views of Central Park and world-class dining.

amenities.amenityDesc: Heated infinity pool with panoramic city views
Full-service spa with 12 treatment rooms
Award-winning French-American cuisine
24-hour gym with personal trainers on request
Round-the-clock concierge assistance

hotels.name: Meridian Suites Chicago
hotels.description: Elegant suites on the Magnificent Mile with easy access to the lakefront, museums, and Chicago's vibrant dining scene.

amenities.amenityDesc: Temperature-controlled lap pool
Fully equipped conference rooms and co-working space
Cocktail bar on the 34th floor with lake views
24-hour valet and self-parking available

hotels.name: Meridian Palace Miami
hotels.description: A beachfront resort on South Beach blending Art Deco heritage with modern luxury. Private beach access and a celebrity-favourite pool deck.

amenities.amenityDesc: Reserved beachfront with cabana service
Olympic-length pool with poolside bar
Caribbean-inspired treatments and hot tub suites
Fresh seafood and Latin-fusion menu

hotels.name: Meridian Tower Toronto
hotels.description: A sleek downtown tower steps from the Financial District and the CN Tower, ideal for both business and leisure travellers.

amenities.amenityDesc: State-of-the-art equipment and yoga studio
Private lounge with complimentary breakfast and evening refreshments
Canadian cuisine with locally sourced ingredients

hotels.name: Meridian Boutique Montreal
hotels.description: A charming boutique hotel in the Plateau-Mont-Royal neighbourhood, surrounded by galleries, bistros, and the best of Montreal's cultural scene.

amenities.amenityDesc: In-house café serving specialty coffee and pastries
Complimentary bikes for exploring the city

hotels.name: Azure Riviera Cannes
hotels.description: A palatial retreat on the Côte d'Azur, host to film stars during the festival season and discerning travellers year-round.

amenities.amenityDesc: Exclusive beachfront with sun beds and champagne service
Provençal seafood by a two-star chef
Talasso therapy and sea-mineral treatments
Arrangements for private yacht hire from the marina

hotels.name: Azure Côte Nice
hotels.description: Belle Époque elegance meets the Mediterranean on Nice's iconic Promenade. Walking distance to the Old Town and bustling Cours Saleya market.

amenities.amenityDesc: Heated seawater pool with panoramic sea views
Curated Provence wine cellar and tasting events
Overlooking the sea with Pilates classes

hotels.name: Azure Med Barcelona
hotels.description: Set in a restored Modernista building on Passeig de Gràcia, steps from the Sagrada Família and Picasso Museum.

amenities.amenityDesc: Open-air terrace with tapas bar and city views
Mediterranean-inspired therapies and hammam
Rotating exhibitions by local Catalan artists

hotels.name: Azure Adriatic Dubrovnik
hotels.description: A historic hotel within the Old Town walls of Dubrovnik, offering stunning Adriatic views and access to the city's UNESCO heritage sites.

amenities.amenityDesc: Cliffside pool overlooking the Adriatic Sea
Dalmatian seafood and regional wines

hotels.name: Azure Garden Lisbon
hotels.description: A stylish mid-century property on Lisbon's grand boulevard, with lush courtyard gardens and a terrace overlooking the avenue.

amenities.amenityDesc: Tranquil garden with orange trees and fountain
Sunset cocktails and fado music evenings

hotels.name: Summit Alpine Zurich
hotels.description: A landmark property on Zurich's most exclusive shopping street, overlooking Lake Zurich and the Alps.

amenities.amenityDesc: Swiss-French cuisine with an 800-label wine cellar
Alpine herb treatments and heated pool
Private banking, ski arrangement, and helicopter bookings

hotels.name: Summit Glacier Zermatt
hotels.description: A car-free alpine sanctuary at the foot of the Matterhorn. Direct gondola access, a celebrated ski-in/ski-out lounge, and glacier views from every room.

amenities.amenityDesc: Heated ski room with boot dryers
Fondue, raclette, and mulled wine fireside
Heated outdoor pool with Matterhorn views

hotels.name: Summit City Geneva
hotels.description: A refined lakeside hotel on the Rive Gauche, ideal for diplomats and international business travellers. Walking distance to the UN and CERN.

amenities.amenityDesc: Private meeting rooms and interpretation services
Swiss cuisine with views of Lake Geneva

hotels.name: Summit Heritage Lucerne
hotels.description: A 19th-century grand hotel overlooking Lake Lucerne and the Chapel Bridge. Wagner and Tolstoy once stayed here.

amenities.amenityDesc: Traditional Swiss dishes in a Belle Époque dining hall
Private dock for lake excursions and paddle-boat hire

hotels.name: Summit Inn Interlaken
hotels.description: A cosy mountain inn between Lakes Thun and Brienz, popular with hikers, paragliders, and adventure travellers heading to the Jungfrau region.

amenities.amenityDesc: Secure storage for skis, bikes, and hiking equipment
Hearty mountain cuisine with local Bernese specialties

hotels.name: Heritage Grand London Mayfair
hotels.description: A Georgian townhouse hotel in the heart of Mayfair, blending 18th-century grandeur with contemporary British design. Two streets from Bond Street.

amenities.amenityDesc: Seasonal British tasting menu with a 1,000-bottle cellar
Afternoon tea served daily in the original Georgian parlour
Aromatherapy and deep-tissue treatments

hotels.name: Heritage Royal Edinburgh
hotels.description: A Victorian landmark facing Edinburgh Castle and the gardens of Princes Street, with baronial interiors and sweeping views of the Old Town.

amenities.amenityDesc: Outdoor terrace overlooking the castle esplanade
Over 200 single malts and blended Scotch whiskies
Victorian-styled gym and heated indoor pool

hotels.name: Heritage Manor Oxford
hotels.description: A neoclassical hotel opposite the Ashmolean Museum, beloved by academics, visiting fellows, and discerning travellers exploring the University city.

amenities.amenityDesc: Quiet reading room with 2,000 volumes and a fire
English garden dining and Sunday roasts

hotels.name: Heritage Townhouse Bath
hotels.description: A perfectly preserved Georgian townhouse on Bath's grandest street, moments from the Roman Baths and the Jane Austen Centre.

amenities.amenityDesc: Access to Bath's famous natural thermal spa waters
Cream teas and Georgian pastries daily

hotels.name: Heritage Inn York
hotels.description: A cheerful inn in the shadow of York Minster, on a cobbled street lined with independent shops and Viking-era archaeology.

amenities.amenityDesc: Real ales, pork pies, and live folk music on Fridays

hotels.name: Pacific Horizon Marina Singapore
hotels.description: An iconic tower hotel overlooking Marina Bay Sands and the glittering Singapore skyline. Infinity pool on the 57th floor.

amenities.amenityDesc: World-famous rooftop pool with 360-degree city and sea views
Asian holistic therapies and couple treatment suites
Pan-Asian cuisine by a four-time award-winning chef
Direct passageway to the Marina Bay casino

hotels.name: Pacific Horizon Orchard
hotels.description: A contemporary city hotel on Singapore's premier shopping strip, ideal for leisure travellers and families visiting Sentosa and the Gardens by the Bay.

amenities.amenityDesc: Tropical garden pool with poolside BBQ
Hawker-style dining featuring 12 Singaporean street food stalls

hotels.name: Pacific Horizon Tokyo Shinjuku
hotels.description: A skyscraper hotel in Shinjuku's high-rise district with breathtaking views of Mount Fuji on clear mornings. Award-winning Japanese kaiseki dining.

amenities.amenityDesc: Multi-course traditional Japanese cuisine
Natural hot spring baths on the 48th floor
Private tatami rooms for traditional tea ceremonies

hotels.name: Pacific Horizon Bangkok Riverside
hotels.description: A riverside resort on the Chao Phraya, with private boat transfers to the Grand Palace, Wat Pho, and Bangkok's famous floating markets.

amenities.amenityDesc: Infinity pool overlooking the Chao Phraya River
Royal Thai cuisine and cooking classes
Complimentary shuttle boat to city temples and markets

hotels.name: Pacific Horizon Sydney Harbour
hotels.description: A five-star icon overlooking the Sydney Opera House and Harbour Bridge from the Royal Botanic Gardens edge. A bucket-list destination in itself.

amenities.amenityDesc: Modern Australian cuisine with an unobstructed Opera House view
Indigenous Australian treatments using native botanicals
Sunset cocktails overlooking the Harbour Bridge
Floor-to-ceiling harbour windows and personal training
